parameters.jsCode: const data=$json.result||$json.body?.result||[];const sd=$getWorkflowStaticData('global');if(!data.length)return [];const u=data[0];const m=u.message;if(!m||!m.text){sd.tgOffset=u.update_id+1;return [];}const SYS="You convert a rough note into a Todoist task. Respond ONLY with minified JSON: {\"content\":\"\",\"description\":\"\",\"due_string\":\"\",\"label\":\"\",\"priority\":1,\"action\":\"none\",\"person\":\"\"}. content=short imperative title. description=extra detail or empty string. due_string=natural-language date/time ONLY if implied (e.g. 'thursday','tomorrow 9am','today'); else empty; never invent. label=ONE short category word if obvious (Blog, Church, Coding, Routines, Kord, Home, Errands), else empty. priority=1 (normal) to 4 (urgent); >1 only if clearly urgent. action='call' if the note is about phoning a person, 'text' if texting/messaging a person, else 'none'. person=the contact name to call/text (e.g. 'Hendrix'), else empty.";const geminiBody=JSON.stringify({system_instruction:{parts:[{text:SYS}]},contents:[{role:'user',parts:[{text:m.text}]}],generationConfig:{maxOutputTokens:400,temperature:0.2}});return [{json:{text:m.text,chatId:m.chat.id,updateId:u.update_id,geminiBody}}];

parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT phone_tel FROM contacts WHERE '{{ $json.personSafe }}'<>'' AND name_lower LIKE '%'||lower('{{ $json.personSafe }}')||'%' LIMIT 1) AS phone_tel, (SELECT phone_raw FROM contacts WHERE '{{ $json.personSafe }}'<>'' AND name_lower LIKE '%'||lower('{{ $json.personSafe }}')||'%' LIMIT 1) AS phone_raw
